title: Hooks Changes Mutate
description: React data hooks for **Hooks Changes Mutate**: loading state, error propagation, and polling rules for `SpecdDataPort`. Hooks keep components free of transport details and `@specd/core` imports.
context: React data hooks for **Hooks Changes Mutate**: loading state, error propagation, and polling rules for `SpecdDataPort`. Hooks keep components free of transport details and `@specd/core` imports.

rules: Validate, transition, patch, and lifecycle actions MUST invoke the corresponding methods on `client:port-changes-mutate`.

rules.requirement: mutate hooks surface save conflicts to the inspector
rules: HTTP 409 responses from save MUST be forwarded to `ui:hooks-inspector-save` for conflict UI; hooks MUST NOT swallow `ArtifactConflictError`.
`usePatchChange` MUST call `port.patchChange` and expose `isPatching`, `error`, and optional `onPatched` callback for description, invalidation policy, and scope changes.

[`ui:change-scope-dialog`](../change-scope-dialog/spec.md) MUST call `port.updateSpecDependencies(name, { specId, set })` per spec whose `dependsOn` list changed, then refetch `getChange` for fresh detail.

scenarios.name: Transition calls port-changes-mutate
when: user approves a lifecycle transition in UI

scenarios.name: Validate uses mutate port with scope
when: user clicks Validate on artifact tab

scenarios.name: Non-conflict errors use toast

scenarios.name: Successful mutate clears error state

when: usePatchChange MUST call port.patchChange and expose isPatching, error,
then: AND no forbidden side effects occur
